flows.name: wopr-hotfix
flows.description: Fast-track pipeline for trivial fixes: skip architect, go straight to coding.

states.name: coding

onEnter.command: node /usr/local/lib/node_modules/@wopr-network/defcon/dist/src/execution/cli.js provision-worktree {{entity.refs.github.repo}} {{entity.refs.linear.key}} --base-path /data/worktrees --clone-root /data/repos | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const lines=d.trim().split('\n');for(let i=lines.length-1;i>=0;i--){try{const r=JSON.parse(lines[i]);const repoName='{{entity.refs.github.repo}}'.split('/').pop();process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({...r,codebasePath:'/repos/'+repoName,worktreePath:r.worktreePath.replace('/data/worktrees/','/worktrees/')}));return}catch(e){}}process.exit(1)})"

states.name: reviewing
fixing
